title: Physiological and Behavioral Synchrony Predict Group Cohesion and Performance.

assets.abstract: Interpersonal synchrony contributes to social functioning in dyads, but it remains unknown how synchrony shapes group experiences and performance. To this end, we designed a novel group drumming task in which participants matched their drumming to either predictable or unpredictable tempos. Fifty-one three-person groups were randomly assigned to one of two conditions: synchronized or asynchronized drumming. Outcome measures included electrocardiograms and self-reports of group cohesion and synch

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Ritual - neural synchrony in joint action, music entrainment, collective bonding.
